headline: Is Record Q2 Earnings And Crypto Expansion Altering The Investment Case For Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR)?
summary: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. reported past second-quarter 2026 results with net income of US$312 million, up from US$224 million a year earlier, and diluted earnings per share from continuing operations of US$0.69 versus US$0.51. Alongside these record earnings, the broker continued to broaden its multi-asset platform, adding new cryptocurrencies, stablecoin funding, and expanded global market access, further integrating digital assets with traditional trading. We’ll now examine how...

headline: Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) Could Be 6% Overvalued Following Record Q2
summary: Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) just posted a record second quarter, with net income of US$312 million and diluted earnings of US$0.69 per share, beating analyst expectations and drawing fresh attention to the stock’s recent rally. See our latest analysis for Interactive Brokers Group. Despite the record quarter and product launches in areas like cryptocurrency, Interactive Brokers Group’s near term share price has cooled slightly.
